action_set_definitions.name: get_hotel_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation date, total cumulative revenue, and the market demand multiplier.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the inventory capacity, current occupancy, and active rates for all room types.

action_set_definitions.name: get_group_holds
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all current group holds, including their unique ID, status, and the room types they are blocking.

action_set_definitions.name: update_group_hold
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the status of a specific group hold to release inventory or confirm revenue.

hold_id.description: The unique identifier for the group hold.

new_status.description: The new status to apply to the hold.

action_set_definitions.name: update_pricing_strategy
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the nightly price and length-of-stay (LOS) restrictions for a specific room category and date range.

nightly_rate.description: The price per night. Note: Standard must be <= 450.

min_los.description: Minimum nights required for a booking.

example_output.strategy_applied: Suite rate set to 850 for 2024-11-01 to 2024-11-03.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_to_date
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the simulation forward to a specific target date.

state_description.current_date: The current simulation date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
state_description.inventory: Mapping of room types to their total capacity and currently occupied count.
state_description.pricing: Current active price per night for each room type.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: Total revenue generated since the start of the simulation.
state_description.market_demand_multiplier: A factor representing current market interest (1.0 is baseline).
